# Bill Bergquist — Software Engineer & Web Developer

## About
Bill Bergquist is a Staff Software Engineer with 14+ years of experience building web applications. Based in the Denver/Lakewood, Colorado area. Currently at Kasa, leading frontend architecture with React, TypeScript, and Node.js.

## Services
Web design and development for small businesses in Denver, Lakewood, Boulder, and the Colorado Front Range. Services include business websites, landing pages, website redesigns, and ongoing support. Pricing typically ranges from $2,000 to $8,000 for small business sites.

- Main services page: https://billbergquist.dev/services/
- Denver: https://billbergquist.dev/services/denver/
- Lakewood: https://billbergquist.dev/services/lakewood/
- Boulder: https://billbergquist.dev/services/boulder/
- Arvada: https://billbergquist.dev/services/arvada/
- Golden: https://billbergquist.dev/services/golden/
- Littleton: https://billbergquist.dev/services/littleton/
- Cost calculator: https://billbergquist.dev/services/estimate/
- Performance scores: https://billbergquist.dev/services/performance/
- Email: services@billbergquist.dev

## Projects
- Critter Care (https://critter-care.com) — Pet sitting business website, rebuilt from scratch with perfect Lighthouse scores
- CreatiCalc (https://creaticalc.com) — Free calculator suite for content creators covering YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and X
- Sports Shortcuts (https://sportsshortcuts.com) — Injury alert generator for sports reporters
